$comment: DNS record configuration templates for johncharlesmonti.com. Replace placeholder values (marked with <...>) before applying to your DNS provider.

records.description: Start of Authority – primary nameserver and zone serial
Root domain – replace with the server public IPv4 address

records.name: pwa
records.description: PWA subdomain – replace with the server public IPv4 address

records.name: eth
records.description: Private Ethereum JSON-RPC node – replace with the server public IPv4 address
Root domain – replace with the server public IPv6 address

records.name: pwa
records.description: PWA subdomain IPv6 – replace with the server public IPv6 address
SPF record – authorise the server to send email on behalf of the domain
DMARC policy – reject unauthenticated mail and request aggregate reports

records.name: _dnslink
records.description: DNSLink record for IPFS/IPNS content addressing (optional)

records.name: _443._tcp.pwa
records.description: DANE TLSA record for HTTPS on pwa.johncharlesmonti.com (DANE-EE, SPKI, SHA-256). Generate the hash with: openssl x509 -in cert.pem -noout -pubkey | openssl pkey -pubin -outform DER | openssl dgst -sha256

records.name: _443._tcp.eth
records.description: DANE TLSA record for HTTPS on eth.johncharlesmonti.com (private Ethereum RPC node)
Certification Authority Authorisation – permit Let's Encrypt to issue certificates
Prohibit wildcard certificate issuance by any CA

notes.TLSA: TLSA records implement DNS-Based Authentication of Named Entities (DANE, RFC 6698). They bind a TLS certificate to a domain name through DNSSEC, eliminating reliance on the traditional CA trust hierarchy. Note: the problem statement referred to these as 'TSLA' records, which is a misspelling of the correct DNS record type name 'TLSA'.
notes.MAGP: Once the montinode/MAGP service is deployed, add an additional A/AAAA record for its hostname and a corresponding TLSA record for its HTTPS endpoint.
notes.DNSSEC: Enable DNSSEC on your zone before publishing TLSA records. DNSSEC provides the chain of trust that DANE relies on.
